# Paper numbers (auto-generated)

> Generated by `scripts/make_paper_numbers.py` from the committed matrix data in `data/evaluation/matrix/`. Every figure here matches Table V (`table5_cross_model.tex`) and the plots (`figures/`).

## V-C-1 Dataset and Setup

- **Total evaluation queries per model:** 230 open-ended questions (healthcare 80 + legal 70 + finance 80).
- **Models (capability tiers):** Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct (local Ollama), Claude Haiku 4.5, Claude Sonnet 4.6 — 9 of 9 (model×domain) cells present.
- **Arms per query:** 2 (ADAPT-AI full pipeline vs. fair `b1_disclaimer` single-call baseline) ⇒ 230 × 3 model runs × 2 arms.
- **Per-domain question categories:**
  - Healthcare (N=80): analysis 16, complex_reasoning 17, compliance_safety 20, hallucination_trap 11, planning 16
  - Legal (N=70): analysis 13, complex_reasoning 14, compliance_safety 20, hallucination_trap 10, planning 13
  - Finance (N=80): analysis 17, complex_reasoning 17, compliance_safety 19, hallucination_trap 11, planning 16
- **Safety-critical categories:** compliance_safety + hallucination_trap; **reasoning categories:** complex_reasoning + analysis + planning.
- **Baseline ladder:** `b0_bare → b1_disclaimer → b2_rag → b3_persona → full`; headline comparison is **full vs b1_disclaimer** (matched token budget, both disclaimer-instructed; safety scored disclaimer-independently).

## V-A Evaluation Design

- **Metrics** (`evaluation/metrics.py`, `ResponseEvaluator`): BLEU-4, ROUGE-L, BERTScore, concept recall/F1 (negation-aware), safety score, critical omissions, hallucination-pattern matches.
- **Composite overall score** = 0.20·BLEU-4 + 0.10·ROUGE-L + 0.40·concept-recall + 0.20·safety − 0.10·(critical omissions) − 0.10·(hallucination matches).
- **Significance:** paired Wilcoxon signed-rank on overall score per cell; matched-pairs rank-biserial effect size; Holm–Bonferroni correction across all 9 cells.
- **Headline result:** ADAPT-AI significantly beats the fair baseline in **legal on Haiku (Holm p=0.004)**; finance/Haiku is borderline (p=0.050); healthcare is a null across all tiers. The win concentrates in safety-critical questions (concept recall + false-premise refusal), **not** a toxicity reduction (raw safety score is at ceiling for both arms).
- **Human agreement:** κ subset + protocol in `evaluation/human_eval/`.

## V-C-3 Cost and Latency

Per-question means. Cost is reported for the Anthropic-billed tiers only (Qwen runs locally; its latency is real, its dollar cost is a pricing-table artifact and is omitted).

| Model | Domain | ADAPT lat (s) | Base lat (s) | Slowdown | ADAPT $/q | Base $/q | Cost× | RAT% |
|-------|--------|--------------:|-------------:|---------:|----------:|---------:|-----:|-----:|
| Qwen2.5-7B | Healthcare | 20.03 | 6.09 | 3.29× | — | — | — | 12% |
| Qwen2.5-7B | Legal | 20.82 | 5.98 | 3.48× | — | — | — | 30% |
| Qwen2.5-7B | Finance | 25.32 | 6.20 | 4.09× | — | — | — | 45% |
| Haiku 4.5 | Healthcare | 11.22 | 4.75 | 2.36× | $0.00446 | $0.00146 | 3.06× | 12% |
| Haiku 4.5 | Legal | 13.63 | 4.83 | 2.82× | $0.00563 | $0.00136 | 4.15× | 30% |
| Haiku 4.5 | Finance | 13.95 | 4.19 | 3.33× | $0.00625 | $0.00130 | 4.82× | 45% |
| Sonnet 4.6 | Healthcare | 22.97 | 16.72 | 1.37× | $0.01903 | $0.00312 | 6.11× | 12% |
| Sonnet 4.6 | Legal | 23.00 | 11.56 | 1.99× | $0.01963 | $0.00199 | 9.89× | 30% |
| Sonnet 4.6 | Finance | 30.70 | 9.26 | 3.31× | $0.03061 | $0.00171 | 17.87× | 45% |

- **Aggregate (Anthropic tiers):** ADAPT-AI is **7.65× more expensive** and **2.53× slower** per question than the single-call baseline (multi-agent pipeline overhead).
- **Per-agent cost split (avg $/q, Anthropic tiers):** primary $0.00665, primary_retry $0.01235, quality $0.00415, rat.decompose $0.00188, rat.synthesis $0.00703 (compliance is rule-based — no LLM call).
